title: Get Free Samples in Germany
description: Discover verified free sample offers from leading brands. Browse the latest opportunities and claim available samples while supplies last.
eligibility: Open to residents of Germany aged 18+. Availability may vary by region. One per household unless otherwise specified.
howItWorks: Click the button below to visit the offer partner's page
Complete the short registration or request form

seo.title: Get Free Samples in Germany | Verified Offers | TryTreat
seo.description: Discover verified free sample offers from leading brands in Germany. Browse the latest opportunities and claim available samples while supplies last.

faq.question: Are these free samples really free?
faq.answer: Yes, all free samples listed are completely free. You may need to fill out a short form or register on the partner site.

faq.question: How long does delivery take?
faq.answer: Delivery typically takes 2-6 weeks depending on the offer and your location within Germany.

faq.question: Can I request multiple samples?
faq.answer: You can browse and claim different offers. Some may be limited to one per household.

seo.title: EDEKA Rewards & Exclusive Offers | TryTreat

faq.question: What kind of rewards does EDEKA offer?
faq.answer: EDEKA offers various promotions including multi-buy discounts, loyalty points, and seasonal offers.

faq.question: Do I need a loyalty card?
faq.answer: Some promotions may require an EDEKA loyalty card or app. Check each offer for specific requirements.
